reviews.review_description: I usually don’t leave reviews for VR games, but I’ll make an exception for this one. I am astonished at how great this game is. The physics are great, the characters are neat, and the overall vibe is amazing. How this game only has 4 reviews is beyond me.

I love this game! graphics aren’t fantastic but everything works well and the characters are all lovely! my only issue with it is I wish there was a good crouch button, but I really love this game and I wanna see more of it!

reviews.review_title: More than just a cooking game
reviews.review_description:
This game is a little hidden gem, personally I was expecting something along the lines of some sorta peaceful Animal Crossing meets Cooking Mama vibes.

There’s way more to it though, it’s got a Legend of Zelda element going for it, too. The climbing and exploration certainly make it fun to just try find little goodies like money flowers stashed around.

I spent only an hour into it and I really am enjoying it. It’s accessible both standing up and sitting down. The characters are unique and memorable. Overall, I’d say it’s worth every penny.
